Airport IATA code LHR refers to London Heathrow international airport.
Vehicle registration plate format in the UK: AB12 CDE.
ISBN 978-0-306-40615-7 identifies this publication uniquely.
The postal code for this delivery is SW1A 1AA in central London.
NATO alphabet: ALFA BRAVO CHARLIE DELTA are the first four letters.
Conference room booking code: CONF2024A, valid for the entire month.
The project code ALPHA12 has been assigned to the new initiative.
Serial number for this device: MBJP2024 (manufactured in Japan).
Error code EABC1234 indicates a network timeout condition.
The customer ID is ACME0042 in our CRM database.
Colour reference PANTONE®285C is a medium blue suitable for logos.
The gene sequence identifier is BRCA1_HUMAN (human BRCA1 protein).
Airport code ZSPD refers to Shanghai Pudong International.
Model number LF3218 is not compatible with the newer firmware.
The QR code payload is WXYZ9876 — scan to access the product page.
License plate GH55 BRT was spotted on the motorway CCTV at 14:32.
Code EURO2024 unlocks the promotional discount at checkout.
